name: Aryan Mehta
bio: Roommate from university. We used to pull all-nighters before exams. Still keeps me grounded.

name: Sadia Islam
bio: Grew up on the same street. Knows my family like her own. Our friendship spans over 15 years.

name: Marcus Williams
bio: Senior engineer who guided me through my first job. Incredibly sharp and always honest with feedback.

name: Priya Nair
bio: We backpacked through Southeast Asia together. Spontaneous, creative, and always up for an adventure.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: We met at a hackathon and have been building side projects ever since. Great at keeping each other accountable.

name: Lena Fischer
bio: Exchange student from Germany. Taught me so much about patience and a different way of seeing the world.

name: Omar Abdullah
bio: Best friend from school. We drifted apart after moving cities but make real effort to stay connected.

name: Nadia Chowdhury
bio: Workout partner turned one of my closest friends. Keeps me disciplined and always shows up when it matters.
